calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-07-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, August 6, 2015 in Department 525:
Karla Jeannette Colindres Santin, Appellant/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Adrienne Haddad, Esq. counsel for Respondent/Defendant Zahra Naser who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Counsel informed the Court that the parties have worked out an agreement to settle.
Court informs counsel and the parties that the Court will dismissed the Appeal per settlement but for counsel to file something with the Small Claims Court to clear the matters.

Court adjourned.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.
